sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42808" key="e)/rusis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔρῠσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐρύω</foreign> A) <sense id="n42808.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a drawing,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">νεῶν</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0563.tlg001:19:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.Tyr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">19.4</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
